groups.theme: Affordability and Subscription Concerns related to the limited features availabe for free
example_reviews: very insightful but needs a program for the financially inadequate its already tough to seek help let alone afford it

everything but the introduction is paywalled i do not need an app to notice what affects mood downloaded for the mental health resources but will use something that offers a chance to text the benefits before charging

good pace good match for content x daily check in to track mood
tracking is an absolute no go with apps that handle data this sensitive

groups.theme: User Stress and Anxiety management and support
example_reviews: so far it has helped me with stress so it really has been helpful i just dont want some halfdone therapy approach do far so good
very helpful thoughtful questions about my mental state its funny how just reflecting on and acknowledging my current mental state can bring calm
